title: Senior Software Development Engineer-Full Stack-AI
description:
We’re building a world of health around every individual —
shaping a more connected, convenient and compassionate
health experience. At CVS Health®, you’ll be surrounded by
passionate colleagues who care deeply, innovate with
purpose, hold ourselves accountable and prioritize safety
and quality in everything we do. Join us and be part of
something bigger – helping to simplify health care one
person, one family and one community at a time.

Position Summary

We are seeking a highly skilled Senior Software Development
Engineer with deep expertise in Angular to help shape and
scale our next‑generation platform products. This role will
focus heavily on building and optimizing real-time chat
experiences and supporting a broad range of chat use cases
across the enterprise.

The Senior Software Development Engineer will architect and
develop reusable UI frameworks, enhance platform-wide
capabilities, and collaborate closely with Product, Backend,
Architecture, and UX teams to deliver seamless, performant,
and reliable chat solutions used across multiple business
lines.

Work Breakdown Structure for This Role

Hands-On Engineering – 75%

- Develop and enhance real-time UI components for platform
  products and reusable Angular frameworks.
- Contribute to DevOps activities, including CI/CD pipelines,
  deployment automation, and environment support.
- Support cloud integrations, configuration, and
  troubleshooting within Google Cloud Platform (GCP) for UI
  and platform product services.

Cross-Functional Collaboration – 25%

- Partner with Product to refine requirements, provide
  estimates, and align on roadmap priorities.
- Work with Architecture to ensure front-end solutions align
  with enterprise platform standards.
- Collaborate with Design to implement accessible, user-
  centered, and pixel-perfect interfaces.
- Engage with engineering peers through code reviews,
  mentoring, and cross-team coordination.

Required Qualifications

- 8+ years of front-end/UI development experience.
- Expert-level proficiency in Angular (Angular 10+),
  TypeScript, RxJS, HTML5, and CSS3/SASS.
- Strong experience designing large-scale Angular component
  libraries and design systems.
- Experience leveraging AI-assisted development tools (e.g.,
  GitHub Copilot, code generation, automated test
  generation).
- Experience integrating or consuming AI/ML-powered APIs
  (e.g., NLP services, chat intelligence, recommendation
  APIs).
- Hands-on experience building platform products and shared UI
  frameworks.
- Deep understanding of modern state management patterns.
- Experience integrating REST APIs and WebSockets for real-
  time features.
- Strong knowledge of browser behavior, performance
  optimization, and responsive design.

Preferred Qualifications

- Experience with GraphQL.
- Experience leveraging container-based technologies.
- Experience with unit, integration, and functional testing
  frameworks.
- Background working with complex systems and solving highly
  analytical problems.
- Experience implementing AI-based features in UI, such as
  smart suggestions, automated chat insights, or generative
  UI enhancements.
- Familiarity with LLM concepts and prompt engineering for
  building intelligent chat & search experience components.
- Experience with cloud-hosted AI services (Google Vertex AI,
  Azure OpenAI, etc.).

Education

- Bachelors Degree in Computer Science, Software Engineering
  or related field-or equivalent relevant experience

Anticipated Weekly Hours

40

Time Type

Full time

Pay Range

The typical pay range for this role is:

$83,430.00 - $222,480.00

This pay range represents the base hourly rate or base
annual full-time salary for all positions in the job grade
within which this position falls.  The actual base salary
offer will depend on a variety of factors including
experience, education, geography and other relevant factors.
This position is eligible for a CVS Health bonus, commission
or short-term incentive program in addition to the base pay
range listed above.


Our people fuel our future. Our teams reflect the customers,
patients, members and communities we serve and we are
committed to fostering a workplace where every colleague
feels valued and that they belong.

Great benefits for great people

We take pride in our comprehensive and competitive mix of
pay and benefits – investing in the physical, emotional and
financial wellness of our colleagues and their families to
help them be the healthiest they can be. In addition to our
competitive wages, our great benefits include:

- Affordable medical plan options, a 401(k) plan (including
  matching company contributions), and an employee stock
  purchase plan.
- No-cost programs for all colleagues including wellness
  screenings, tobacco cessation and weight management
  programs, confidential counseling and financial coaching.
- Benefit solutions that address the different needs and
  preferences of our colleagues including paid time off,
  flexible work schedules, family leave, dependent care
  resources, colleague assistance programs, tuition
  assistance, retiree medical access and many other benefits
  depending on eligibility.

For more information, visit
https://jobs.cvshealth.com/us/en/benefits

We anticipate the application window for this opening will
close on: 06/15/2026

Qualified applicants with arrest or conviction records will
be considered for employment in accordance with all federal,
state and local laws.
responsibilities: Develop and enhance real-time UI components for platform products and reusable Angular frameworks
Architect and develop reusable UI frameworks and enhance platform-wide capabilities
Integrate AI/ML-powered APIs including NLP services, chat intelligence, and recommendation APIs
Implement AI-based features in UI such as smart suggestions and automated chat insights
Contribute to DevOps activities including CI/CD pipelines and deployment automation
Support cloud integrations, configuration, and troubleshooting within Google Cloud Platform
Partner with Product, Backend, Architecture, and UX teams to deliver chat solutions
Collaborate through code reviews, mentoring, and cross-team coordination
use_cases: Real-time chat experiences across enterprise applications
Enterprise search with intelligent chat capabilities
AI-powered smart suggestions and automated insights
Generative UI enhancements for improved user experience
ai_classification_reasoning:
This is a Full Stack role focused on building front-end UI
components for chat experiences and consuming AI/ML APIs
rather than building, training, or deploying models. The
engineer integrates existing AI services (NLP,
recommendation APIs, Google Vertex AI) into UI solutions,
which is supporting AI work rather than hands-on model
development.
